message:
Add .vercelignore to exclude large and ephemeral files from Vercel upload

A 33GB core dump (core.3212325) in the project root was blocking
Vercel deployments with "File size greater than 2 GiB" errors.
Rather than deleting the core dump (which may be needed for
debugging), add a .vercelignore that excludes:

- Core dumps (core.*, *.core)
- The jfp Rust binary and its variants
- Screenshot and illustration images in the repo root
- Alert files, test artifacts, e2e reports
- Beads cache, Cargo.lock, and planning documents

This unblocks `vercel --prod` without modifying the working tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
